scripts.build: npm run build -w @geniusdebug/shared && npm run build -w @geniusdebug/db && npm run build --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test: npm run test -w @geniusdebug/shared --if-present && npm run test -w @geniusdebug/ingest && npm run test -w @geniusdebug/workers && npm run test -w @geniusdebug/api
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,ingest,workers,web -c blue,green,magenta,cyan "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:ingest" "npm run dev:workers" "npm run dev:web"
